economic_notes: Investments in Centre Creek Limited Partnership (property management in Chilliwack River Valley), Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society (property rentals), Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe Limited Partnership and Ts'elxweyeqw Forestry Limited Partnership (forestry operations around Chilliwack BC). COVID-19 noted as not significantly impacting FY2020 operations.
notes: Financial statements signed May 2, 2022 — approximately two years after fiscal year end, indicating significant delay. Five fully consolidated subsidiaries (Th'Ewali Forestry Ltd., Th'Ewali Fisheries Ltd., Th'Ewali Resources Ltd., Social Housing, Health). Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (Centre Creek LP, Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society, Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe LP). Annual surplus is a deficit of $72,841. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $1,601,781 + FNHA $614,574 + CMHC $32,851 + New Relationship Trust $21,000 + SASET $70,911 + FNESC $5,124 = $2,346,241 less SASET and FNESC may not be strictly government; conservative total used. Deferred revenue of $461,352 entirely from ISC contributions received but not yet recognized. Capital Fund expense of $226,217 equals amortization. No remuneration schedule found in provided text.
